info.title: SharpAPI
info.description:
Real-time sports betting odds API with +EV detection, arbitrage, middles, and low-hold opportunities.

## Authentication

All authenticated endpoints accept an API key via one of three methods:

| Method | Header / Param | Use case |
|--------|---------------|----------|
| `X-API-Key` | `X-API-Key: sk_live_...` | Recommended for server-side |
| `Authorization` | `Authorization: Bearer sk_live_...` | Standard Bearer token |
| `api_key` query | `?api_key=sk_live_...` | SSE/EventSource (cannot set headers) |

## Subscription Tiers

| Tier | Rate Limit | Data Delay | Max Books | EV | Arb | Middles | Game State |
|------|-----------|------------|-----------|-----|-----|---------|------------|
| Free | 12/min | 60s | 2 (DK, FD) | - | - | - | - |
| Hobby | 120/min | Real-time | 5 | - | Yes | - | - |
| Pro | 300/min | Real-time | 15 | Yes | Yes | Yes | - |
| Sharp | 1000/min | Real-time | All | Yes | Yes | Yes | - |
| Enterprise | Custom | Real-time | All | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |

## Rate Limit Headers

Every authenticated response includes:

- `X-RateLimit-Limit` - Requests allowed per minute
- `X-RateLimit-Remaining` - Requests remaining in current window
- `X-RateLimit-Reset` - Unix timestamp when the window resets
- `X-Data-Delay` - Odds delay in seconds for your tier (0 = real-time)
- `X-Request-Id` - Unique request identifier for support

tags.name: Reference Data
tags.description: Sports, leagues, sportsbooks, markets, and teams

tags.name: Odds
tags.description: Odds snapshots, comparisons, batch, and deltas

tags.name: Account

get.description: Returns service health status, Redis connectivity, data freshness, and schema compatibility. No authentication required.
Returns available sports with event and live counts. Public endpoint with optional API key for higher rate limits.
Returns details for a single sport.
Returns available leagues with event counts. Optionally filter by sport.
Returns available sportsbooks with status, capabilities, and event counts. Use `catalog=true` for a config-based catalog that doesn't require live data.
Returns details for a single sportsbook.
Returns available market types with descriptions, examples, and event counts.

data.name: Moneyline
data.description: Bet on which team will win the game outright

get.description: Returns teams aggregated from current odds snapshots.

Returns events aggregated from current odds snapshots. Supports filtering by sport, league, live status, team name, date, and text search.

**Authentication required.**
Returns details for a single event.
Returns available market types for a specific event.

200.description: List of markets for the event

get.description: Returns odds for a specific event, optionally filtered by sportsbook and market.

Returns odds across all sportsbooks and events. Supports extensive filtering, sorting, field selection, and grouping.

**Sort options:** `odds_american`, `odds_decimal`, `probability`, `timestamp`, `event_start_time`, `sportsbook`, `sport`, `league`. Prefix with `-` for descending.

**Field selection:** Use `fields` to return only specific fields (e.g., `fields=id,odds_american,sportsbook`).

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix with `-` for descending (e.g., `-odds_american`).

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

get.description: Returns the best available odds for each selection across all sportsbooks.
Returns side-by-side odds comparison for a specific event across all sportsbooks.

post.description:
Returns odds for multiple events in a single request. Batch size limits vary by tier:
- Free: 5 events
- Hobby: 20 events
- Pro: 50 events
- Sharp/Enterprise: 100 events

get.description: Returns odds that have changed since the given ISO 8601 timestamp.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp to get changes since

200.description: Odds changed since the given timestamp

get.description:
Returns positive expected value betting opportunities. Requires **Pro** tier or higher.

EV is calculated by devigging sharp book lines (typically Pinnacle) and comparing
against other sportsbook prices.

**Sort options:** `ev` (default), `odds`, `confidence`, `start_time`, `kelly`.

Returns arbitrage (sure-bet) opportunities across sportsbooks. Requires **Hobby** tier or higher.

**Sort options:** `profit` (default), `start_time`, `sport`.

**Format:** Set `format=csv` for CSV export. Set `group=best` to return only the highest-profit arb per event.

Returns middle betting opportunities where both sides of a line can win simultaneously. Requires **Pro** tier or higher.

**Sort options:** `quality` (default), `ev`, `probability`, `middle_size`.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: US state code for deep link generation

get.description: Returns details for a single middle opportunity. Requires **Pro** tier or higher.
Returns aggregated middle opportunity counts by sport and league. Requires **Pro** tier or higher.

Returns markets with unusually low bookmaker hold (vig), indicating efficient pricing. Requires **Hobby** tier or higher.

**Sort options:** `hold` (default), `market`, `sport`.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: US state code for deep link generation

get.description:
Server-Sent Events stream for real-time odds and opportunity updates. Requires streaming access (WebSocket add-on, Enterprise tier, or active trial).

Use `api_key` query parameter for authentication since `EventSource` cannot set headers.

## Channels

| Channel | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `opportunities` | EV, arbitrage, middles, low-hold updates (default) |
| `odds` | Raw odds changes |
| `all` | Both odds and opportunities |
| `gamestate` | Live game state updates (Enterprise only) |

## Event Types

| Event | Payload | Description |
|-------|---------|-------------|
| `connected` | `{filters, channels}` | Stream established |
| `snapshot` | Array of items | Initial data dump (one per type) |
| `snapshot:complete` | `{}` | All snapshots sent |
| `odds:update` | `Odds` | Odds changed |
| `odds:removed` | `{id, sportsbook}` | Selection removed |
| `ev:detected` | `EVOpportunity` | New +EV opportunity |
| `ev:expired` | `{id}` | EV opportunity gone |
| `arb:detected` | `ArbitrageOpportunity` | New arbitrage |
| `arb:expired` | `{id}` | Arbitrage gone |
| `middles:detected` | `MiddleOpportunity` | New middle |
| `middles:expired` | `{id}` | Middle gone |
| `low_hold:detected` | `LowHoldOpportunity` | New low-hold |
| `low_hold:expired` | `{id}` | Low-hold gone |
| `gamestate:snapshot` | `{sport, events}` | Initial game state |
| `gamestate:update` | `{sport, event_id, ...}` | Game state changed |
| `heartbeat` | `{ts}` | Keep-alive (every 30s) |
| `error` | `{message}` | Recoverable error |

Supports `Last-Event-ID` header for reconnection.

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.description: API key (for EventSource which cannot set headers)

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: US state code for deep link generation

schema.description: Server-Sent Events stream. Each event has `event:` type, `data:` JSON payload, and `id:` for reconnection.

error.message: Streaming requires WebSocket add-on or Enterprise tier

get.description: Returns API key details, tier, limits, feature access, and add-on status.
Returns request counts, rate limit status, and stream usage for the current billing period.
Returns all API keys for the authenticated user.

post.description:
Creates a new API key for the authenticated user. The key value is returned only once in the response.
Maximum keys per tier: Free/Hobby/Pro = 1, Sharp = 2, Enterprise = custom.

name.description: Optional display name for the key

200.description: New API key created (key value shown only once)

key.description: The API key value (shown only once)

meta.warning: This is the only time the key value will be shown. Store it securely.

get.summary: Get deep links for an opportunity
get.description: Generates sportsbook deep link URLs for a given opportunity ID. The ID comes from the `id` field in EV, arbitrage, middles, or low-hold responses. Requires **Hobby** tier or higher.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: US state code for state-specific deep links

post.description: Returns deep links for multiple opportunity IDs. Requires **Hobby** tier or higher.

get.description:
Redirects to a sportsbook deep link. No authentication required.
Returns a 302 redirect to the sportsbook URL, or 404 if the link cannot be generated.

parameters.name: fallback
parameters.description: Fallback URL if deep link cannot be generated

get.description: Returns available futures markets with metadata, merged across all sportsbooks. Public endpoint.
Returns cross-book odds for a specific futures market. Requires authentication.
Returns a summary of sports with available game state data. Requires **Enterprise** tier.

ttl.description: TTL in seconds for this sport's data

get.summary: Get game state for a sport
get.description: Returns live game state data for all events in a sport. Requires **Enterprise** tier.

200.description: Game state data for all live events

ApiKeyHeader.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyHeader.description: API key passed in the `X-API-Key` header

BearerAuth.description: API key passed as a Bearer token in the `Authorization` header

ApiKeyQuery.name: api_key
ApiKeyQuery.description: API key as query parameter (for SSE/EventSource only)

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining in the current window

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp (ms) when the rate limit window resets

X-Data-Delay.description: Odds data delay in seconds (0 = real-time)

add_sportsbook.name: add_sportsbook
add_sportsbook.description: Add sportsbook(s) to the default set for your tier (can appear multiple times)

event.name: event
event.description: Filter by event ID (comma-separated). Alias `event_id` also accepted.

has_score.name: has_score
has_score.description: Filter events that have (true) or lack (false) game state scores

max_odds_age.name: max_odds_age
max_odds_age.description: Maximum odds age in seconds (filters out stale odds)

TierRestricted.description: Feature requires a higher subscription tier

error.message: EV opportunities requires pro tier or higher

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the rate limit resets

count.description: Number of items in this page

required_tier.description: Minimum tier required for this feature

retry_after.description: Unix timestamp (ms) when request can be retried

external_ids.description: Sportsbook-native event IDs keyed by book

EventGameState.description: Live game state data. Only present for live events with score data.

line.description: Point spread or total line (null for moneyline)

timestamp.description: When these odds were last updated

event_ids.description: Array of event IDs to fetch odds for

market_width.description: Spread between best and worst odds across books

external_event_id.description: Sportsbook-native event ID for deep linking

selection_id.description: Sportsbook outcome/selection ID for bet-level deep links

kelly_fraction.description: Optimal bet fraction (0.0-1.0) from Kelly criterion

book_count.description: Number of books offering this market

arb_available.description: Whether an arbitrage opportunity exists for this market

possibly_stale.description: Whether the odds may be stale

oldest_odds_age_seconds.description: Age of the oldest odds used in this calculation

ev_available.description: Whether a +EV opportunity also exists for this market

estimated_net_profit_percent.description: Profit percentage after estimated transaction costs

stake_percent.description: Recommended stake as percentage of total bankroll

OpportunityGameState.description: Simplified game state for opportunity endpoints

middle_numbers.description: The numbers that fall in the middle

middle_probability.description: Probability of landing in the middle

worst_case_loss.description: Maximum loss if the middle doesn't hit

best_case_profit.description: Profit if the result lands in the middle

is_guaranteed_profit.description: Whether this middle guarantees profit regardless of outcome

key_numbers.description: Key numbers in this sport (e.g., 3 and 7 in NFL)

quality_score.description: Overall quality score combining multiple factors

market_overround.description: Combined implied probability of both sides

hold_percentage.description: Bookmaker hold (vig) percentage. Lower is better for bettors.

side3.description: Third side (3-way markets like soccer moneyline with draw)

all_books.description: All sportsbooks contributing to this opportunity

odds_age_seconds.description: Age of the odds in seconds

books.description: Sportsbooks offering the best odds on this side

deep_links.description: Deep link URLs keyed by sportsbook
